languages.text: {n}В зарковских легендах полярная шапка мира надолго стала местом проклятым и зловещим. Северные ветра теперь доносят потусторонний смех и шепот нездешних голосов. Но эта жертва не была напрасной — Погонщицы попросту не могли устоять перед приманкой. Пусть враг пожирает врага.{/n}

{n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В зарковских легендах полярная шапка мира надолго стала местом проклятым и зловещим. Северные ветра теперь доносят потусторонний смех и шепот нездешних голосов. Но эта жертва не была напрасной — Погонщицы попросту не могли устоять перед приманкой. Пусть враг пожирает врага.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコビアンの伝説によると、世界の極冠は古くから呪われた悪意に満ちた場所であった。今では異界の笑い声や奇妙な声のささやきが北風に乗って聞こえる。しかしこの犠牲は無駄ではなかった。放牧民は餌に抵抗できなかった。敵は敵を食らう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ザルコビアンの伝説によると、世界の極冠は古くから呪われた悪意に満ちた場所であった。今では異界の笑い声や奇妙な声のささやきが北風に乗って聞こえる。しかしこの犠牲は無駄ではなかった。放牧民は餌に抵抗できなかった。敵は敵を食らう。

languages.text: {n}Según las leyendas de Zarkov, el casquete polar del planeta es un lugar maldito y perverso. Ahora se oyen risas sobrenaturales y susurros extraños en los vientos del norte, pero el sacrificio no ha sido en vano. Los Pastores son incapaces de resistirse al cebo. Dejemos que los enemigos se devoren entre ellos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Según las leyendas de Zarkov, el casquete polar del planeta es un lugar maldito y perverso. Dejemos que los enemigos se devoren entre ellos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在扎尔科夫的传说里，这个世界的极冠是邪恶的诅咒之地。如今，此地的北风中裹挟着异界的笑声与诡谲低语。但这场牺牲并非徒劳——拒生花无力抗拒诱饵。且让敌人们互相残杀去罢。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在扎尔科夫的传说里，这个世界的极冠是邪恶的诅咒之地。如今，此地的北风中裹挟着异界的笑声与诡谲低语。但这场牺牲并非徒劳——拒生花无力抗拒诱饵。且让敌人们互相残杀去罢。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Legende nach war die Polkappe von Zarkov lange Zeit ein verfluchter und bösartiger Ort. Heute ist der Nordwind dort von außerweltlichem Gelächter und dem Flüstern seltsamer Stimmen erfüllt. Aber dieses Opfer war nicht umsonst ... die Treiber konnten dem Köder nicht widerstehen. Möge der Feind den Feind verschlingen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

Möge der Feind den Feind verschlingen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkov efsaneleri, dünyanın kutbunun uzun zamandır lanetli ve kötücül bir yer olduğunu söyler. Şimdilerde orada, kuzey rüzgârlarıyla taşınan öteki dünya kahkahaları ve tuhaf seslerin fısıltıları duyuluyor. Ancak bu fedakârlık boşa gitmedi. Çobanlar, yeme karşı koymadan edemedi. Düşman düşmanı yiyecek.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkov efsaneleri, dünyanın kutbunun uzun zamandır lanetli ve kötücül bir yer olduğunu söyler. Şimdilerde orada, kuzey rüzgârlarıyla taşınan öteki dünya kahkahaları ve tuhaf seslerin fısıltıları duyuluyor. Ancak bu fedakârlık boşa gitmedi. Çobanlar, yeme karşı koymadan edemedi. Düşman düşmanı yiyecek.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Selon les légendes zarkoviennes, la calotte polaire serait un lieu maudit et malveillant, où des rires surnaturels et d'étranges murmures sont portés par les vents du nord. Cependant, ce sacrifice ne fut pas vain : les Chasseurs ne purent résister à la tentation. Ainsi, l'ennemi dévora l'ennemi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}
